title: ricinocarpus capillipes
intro: Ricinocarpus capillipes, also known as the Five-angled Ricinocarpus, is a plant species belonging to the Sapindaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus capillipes include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be administered to patients to promote health and well-being.
